title: Real sampled charging profiles for electric vehicles within the project "Munich electrified" (Germany)

oep_metadata.name: id_opendata=77
oep_metadata.title: Real sampled charging profiles for electric vehicles within the project "Munich electrified" (Germany)
oep_metadata.description:
These real measured and anonymized charging profiles were processed as part of the "Munich electrified" project by the FfE in cooperation with the Institute of Automotive Technologies (Technical University of Munich). The data set comprises over 2000 recorded charging processes including electrical parameters in a sample time of five minutes. Charging processes with a charging power of 11 to 50 kW were recorded.
The data set includes various electrical parameters such as:
- Currents through individual phases
- Voltages between the individual phases
- Apparent, active and reactive power
